title: Trump Holds Meeting on Iran Deal, Strait of Hormuz
summary: Trump convenes a key White House meeting to discuss reopening the Strait of Hormuz and addressing Iran's uranium enrichment program.
charlotte_impact: Escalating tensions with Iran could lead to military conflict and disrupt global oil supplies.
